stalenessPolicy: Re-verify against control/docs/PROGRAM_MANAGER_OUTPUT_CONTRACT.md before any Program Manager completion/status contract claim; operational backlog/status remains UNKNOWN unless a separate approved truth source is provided.

milestones.title: Program Manager output contract source verified
acceptanceCriteria: Approved source defines required schema fields, evidence labels, completion-claim safety rules, approval gates, and non-scope boundaries.
verificationPlan: Read control/docs/PROGRAM_MANAGER_OUTPUT_CONTRACT.md and confirm the contract language is present.
Run Program Manager static and contract evals after state updates.

milestones.title: Live Program Manager operational backlog and current project status
acceptanceCriteria: A separate approved truth source provides current milestones, tasks, owners, dependencies, blockers, and verification evidence.
verificationPlan: Request and inspect a separate approved operational truth source before claiming current project status.

unknowns: Current real project tasks are not provided by the approved output contract source.
Current real owners, dependencies, blockers, and completion evidence are not provided by the approved output contract source.
